nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session State (Top View with Coach Prompt)
nodes.description: Home screen in active/Activo state. Header: green dot 'SESIÓN ACTIVA', headline 'Estás en la zona.', subtext 'El ruido está fuera. Tu mente, dentro.' Top-right icons: radial/focus icon and notification bell with badge. Main card: coach bubble 'Tu coach — Tienes 3 elementos en tu ritual de hoy. ¿Te ayudo a repartirlos durante la sesión para aprovecharlos bien?' with CTA 'Organizar mi ritual →'. Timer visible below (10:14, quedan 19:46). Session duration: de 30 min · 13 min de claridad. Red 'Finalizar sesión' button. Protection strip: 'Sin apps protegidas / Activar' button. Below: 'Tu ritual de hoy — Sin rutinas', 'Mi aprendizaje del día' sections.

nodes.label: AI Coach Bubble — Ritual Organization Prompt
nodes.description: In-session AI coach bubble overlaid on timer card. Shows 'Tu coach' label, message offering to distribute ritual elements across the session, and 'Organizar mi ritual →' action link. Appears when user has ritual items but no schedule. Proactive AI suggestion pattern.

nodes.label: Session Timer Card — Active Focus Countdown
nodes.description: Dark card showing active focus session timer. Time remaining displayed large (10:14 in this view). Secondary: 'quedan 19:46'. Session metadata: 'de 30 min · 13 min de claridad'. Red 'Finalizar sesión' button at bottom of card. Timer uses circular progress arc (teal/green accent).

nodes.label: App Protection Strip — No Apps Protected / Activar CTA
nodes.description: Horizontal strip below session timer. Left: shield icon + 'Sin apps protegidas' label. Right: green 'Activar' pill button. Prompts user to enable app blocking protection during session. Distinct from the active protection strip (which shows blocked app pills).

nodes.label: Session Active Header — Green Dot + Headline
nodes.description: Active session header pattern: green dot indicator + 'SESIÓN ACTIVA' label, large bold headline 'Estás en la zona.', motivational subtext 'El ruido está fuera. Tu mente, dentro.' Top-right: focus/radial icon button + notification bell with badge. Consistent across home-top and home-active-view.
